testcase.name: Forward Auth - Session Persistence › Session works across multiple forward-auth services
testcase.system-out:
🧪 Testing session persistence across services
Visiting JupyterHub... ✅ JupyterHub accessed without re-auth
Visiting Prometheus... ✅ Prometheus accessed without re-auth
Visiting Homepage... ✅ Homepage accessed without re-auth
✅ Session persisted across all services
